tasks.subject: Slice A: scaffold + simple-agent-comms rename
tasks.description: git init (done), create skills/simple-agent-comms/ by copying & renaming subagent-file-comms; tweak SKILL.md metadata and content; install global symlinks in ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.agents/skills/; commit.

tasks.subject: Slice B: design + build simple-agent-room scripts
tasks.description: Design the room file format (JSON-Lines) and location (~/.cache/simple-agent-room/); build simple_room_lib + send/monitor/scan Python entry points; expose as simple-room-send/-monitor/-scan on PATH; commit.

tasks.subject: Slice C: SKILL.md for simple-agent-room with flowcharts
tasks.description: Write skills/simple-agent-room/SKILL.md with ASCII flowcharts (send, monitor, scan, e2e topology), usage examples that hide paths, the self-filter pattern, inotify reasoning; commit.

tasks.subject: Slice D: unit + integration tests
tasks.description: tests/test_unit.py (pytest for lib + entry points), tests/test_inotify.sh (subprocess monitor + send + timing), tests/test_install.sh (PATH + symlinks); commit.

tasks.subject: Slice E: e2e with tmux + two pi agents
tasks.description: tests/test_e2e_pi.sh — spin up tmux, two pi --print panes, give each the skill, scripted exchange, assert transcript; record the model that worked in tests/MODEL_NOTES.md.
tasks.activeForm: Running e2e test with tmux and two pi agents

tasks.subject: Slice F: GitHub repo creation + final docs
tasks.description: gh repo create clankercode/agent-file-chat --public with description; push; write README.md (overview, install, usage, e2e) and LICENSE (MIT).
tasks.activeForm: Creating GitHub repo and final docs

tasks.subject: Slice G: PIRFL review pass
tasks.description: Run correctness + goal-fit + edge-case + integration reviews against acceptance criteria; fix accepted issues; commit.
tasks.activeForm: Running PIRFL review and fixing accepted issues
